MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH SACRAMENTO, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JOSEPH LIANG
LILY KORMAN & RACHEL JOHNSON, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEYS FOR DEFENDANT THU NGUYEN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.
TOAN NGUYEN, VIETNAMESE IINTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT THU NGUYEN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES ENTER INTO AN AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT; SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD; PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL JOSEPH SACRAMENTO STATES THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING: IT IS STIPULATED THAT DEFENDANT THU NGUYEN SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH LIANG IN THE AMOUNT OF $4000.00 FOR THE MONTHS OF OCTOBER AND NOVEMBER ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 1, 2006; WITH A MOVE OUT DATE OF DECEMBER 1, 2006. IT IS FURTHER STIPULATED THAT IF MS. NGUYEN IS TO CONTINUE TO STAY AT THE PRESMISES, THEN SHE IS TO PAY $2000.00 EVERY MONTH AT THE BEGINNING OF THE MONTH WITH A LAST DAY TO EXTEND OF JUNE 30, 2007. AT THIS POINT SHE IS TO HAVE NO FURTHER EXTENTIONS AND IS ORDERED TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY JULY 1, 2007. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT

JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVE TAXMAN; CLERK: SHERIFE HUSENY; REPORTER BELDON YEE #2647 (218)
